label: Japanese Streetwear
description: a photo of someone wearing Japanese Streetwear, dark layered silhouettes, asymmetric shirting, dropped crotches, longline outerwear, tabi-like footwear, and avant street styling create an off-balance Harajuku silhouette. Charcoal, washed black, ink navy, olive, and ecru dominate technical cotton, gabardine, raw hems, and sculptural drape tied to Tokyo designer fashion rather than flashy faux fur or western denim styling.

label: Gorpcore
description: a photo of someone wearing Gorpcore, nylon shells, fleece zip-ups, trail sneakers, and cargo pockets are built in moss, slate, rust, and safety orange. The silhouette is practical and weather-ready, borrowing from hiking uniforms, alpine gear, and performance outerwear culture.

label: Quiet Luxury
description: a photo of someone wearing Quiet Luxury, immaculate coats, fine-gauge knitwear, pleated trousers, soft shirting, loafers, and smooth leather accessories create a discreetly expensive silhouette. Camel, cream, taupe, navy, chocolate, and soft black appear in cashmere, brushed wool, silk, and polished leather with wealth signaled through cut, fabric, and restraint rather than logos.

label: Y2K
description: a photo of someone wearing Y2K, low-rise or baggy denim, cropped tops, faux fur trims, tinted glasses, metallic chains, glossy synthetics, and hyper-styled early internet details create a flashy turn-of-the-millennium silhouette. Silver, icy blue, pink, lime, black, and acid brights pair with rhinestones, tiny bags, pointed footwear, and nightclub-era accessories.

label: Dark Academia
description: a photo of someone wearing Dark Academia, tweed blazers, pleated trousers, wool coats, and knit vests build a scholarly silhouette in espresso, oxblood, charcoal, and antique ivory. Heavy textures, leather satchels, loafers, and library-toned layering evoke old universities, poetry, and candlelit interiors.

label: Avant-garde
description: a photo of someone wearing Avant-garde, asymmetric cuts, sculptural volume, and unexpected voids distort the body into a runway object rather than a conventional outfit. Matte black, bone, pewter, and blood red dominate surfaces of bonded wool, neoprene, coated cotton, and experimental draping.

label: Workwear
description: a photo of someone wearing Workwear, canvas chore jackets, corduroy collars, carpenter or double-knee pants, boxy overshirts, and sturdy leather shoes create a practical labor-inspired silhouette. Faded charcoal, khaki, tobacco, olive, indigo, and ecru appear in duck canvas, denim, corduroy, and matte leather with patch pockets, utility seams, and durable hardware.

label: Techwear
description: a photo of someone wearing Techwear, angular shells, modular straps, articulated knees, and waterproof layers create a sharp urban survival silhouette. Black, graphite, and storm grey technical fabrics with taped seams and matte hardware suggest cybernetic mobility and weather defense.

label: Old Money
description: a photo of someone wearing Old Money, navy blazers, pleated chinos, oxford shirts, fine-gauge sweaters, sweater-over-shoulders styling, loafers, and restrained jewelry create an inherited-wealth leisure silhouette. Cream, navy, khaki, racing green, camel, and white appear in wool, cashmere, cotton poplin, and polished leather with country-club, equestrian, and ivy leisure references rather than relaxed linen suiting or streetwear jerseys.

label: Normcore
description: a photo of someone wearing Normcore, straight jeans, plain crewnecks, zip fleeces, and generic sneakers are styled with deliberate anti-fashion neutrality. Heather grey, medium wash denim, white, navy, and black keep the palette anonymous and suburban.

label: Preppy
description: a photo of someone wearing Preppy, oxford shirts, rugby tops, cable knits, pleated chinos or skirts, loafers, and crest-coded layers create a polished collegiate silhouette. Navy, forest green, burgundy, cream, and khaki pair with striped trims, club ties, lettered knitwear, and campus-ready tailoring rather than athletic shorts and sneaker-led styling.

label: Bohemian
description: a photo of someone wearing Bohemian, flowing skirts, embroidered blouses, slouchy layers, and soft suede accessories create a free-moving silhouette. Ochre, rust, cream, plum, and faded floral prints mix with fringe, crochet, and artisan textile references.

label: Cottagecore
description: a photo of someone wearing Cottagecore, puff sleeves, prairie dresses, aprons, and soft cardigans create a pastoral silhouette in butter, sage, rose, and milk white. Cotton eyelet, linen, tiny florals, and lace trims evoke gardens, heirloom linens, and rural domestic romance.

label: Clean Girl
description: a photo of someone wearing Clean Girl, fitted tanks, smooth trousers, sleek blazers, and minimal gold accents produce a polished body-conscious silhouette. White, beige, oatmeal, chocolate, and soft black appear in ribbed jersey, polished cotton, and glossy skin-adjacent styling.

label: Maximalism
description: a photo of someone wearing Maximalism, bold jewelry, multiple prints, saturated color, and exaggerated proportion stack into a visually dense outfit. Velvet, jacquard, sequins, embroidery, and clashing accessories create an intentional overload of texture and pattern.

label: 90s Minimalism
description: a photo of someone wearing 90s Minimalism, slip dresses, narrow tanks, clean suiting, and slim coats create a refined and nearly architectural silhouette. Black, stone, espresso, ivory, and muted grey appear in satin, fine wool, and matte leather with almost no decoration.

label: Grunge
description: a photo of someone wearing Grunge, flannel shirts, ripped denim, oversized knits, and worn combat boots create a slouched silhouette with visible wear and tear. Muddy red, forest green, faded black, and dirty grey pair with distressed textures and thrifted layering.

label: Punk
description: a photo of someone wearing Punk, torn tees, leather jackets, bondage straps, and aggressive hardware produce a confrontational silhouette. Black, tartan red, silver, and white are amplified by safety pins, studs, chains, and DIY destruction.

label: Skater
description: a photo of someone wearing Skater, baggy denim, graphic hoodies, oversized tees, and flat skate shoes create a loose and low-slung silhouette. Faded blacks, washed indigo, off-white, and sunbleached brights evoke skate parks, asphalt, and worn cotton jersey.

label: Utilitarian
description: a photo of someone wearing Utilitarian, field jackets, cargo pockets, belted layers, tactical vests, and straight practical trousers emphasize storage, function, and modular dressing over ornament. Olive, khaki, sand, black, and stone dominate canvas, ripstop, twill, and weathered nylon with military, expedition, and fieldwear cues.

label: Denim Culture
description: a photo of someone wearing Denim Culture, raw or dark-wash selvedge jeans, trucker jackets, five-pocket construction, visible topstitching, and heritage denim layering center the outfit around indigo craftsmanship. Deep indigo, tobacco, ecru, and washed blue appear in rigid denim with whiskering, selvedge edges, chain stitching, and collector-minded denim references rather than generic casual jeans.

label: Tailoring
description: a photo of someone wearing Tailoring, structured or double-breasted blazers, defined lapels, pressed wide or straight trousers, dress shirts or open refined collars, and polished leather shoes create a formal precise silhouette. Navy, charcoal, black, camel, ivory, and sage appear in wool suiting, linen suiting, crisp poplin, satin lapels, sharp crease lines, and suit construction details associated with menswear tailoring and formal dressing.

label: Sportswear Luxe
description: a photo of someone wearing Sportswear Luxe, football jerseys, elevated rugby tops, sleek training jackets, zip knits, athletic shorts or relaxed trousers, and premium sneakers are styled as fashion rather than pure sport. Black, cream, navy, scarlet, cobalt, forest green, and jewel tones appear in lustrous jersey, satin, technical knit, soft leather, and embroidered sport details that feel expensive, polished, and runway-aware instead of collegiate preppy.

label: Romantic
description: a photo of someone wearing Romantic, soft drape, ruffles, sheer layers, and delicate waist emphasis create a tender and fluid silhouette. Blush, ivory, mauve, powder blue, and antique gold pair with chiffon, lace, satin, and floral detail.

label: Subversive Basics
description: a photo of someone wearing Subversive Basics, wardrobe staples like tees, tanks, and shirts are cut with slashes, twists, sheer panels, or displaced seams. Neutral colors keep the palette familiar while the construction quietly destabilizes the expected silhouette.

label: Archive Fashion
description: a photo of someone wearing Archive Fashion, rare runway pieces, unusual pattern cutting, and historically specific garments are styled with collector precision. Faded blacks, complex hardware, technical nylon, and iconic seasonal details reference sought-after designer eras.

label: Indie Sleaze
description: a photo of someone wearing Indie Sleaze, sheer tights, leather jackets, messy tees, and nightlife styling create a disheveled after-hours silhouette. Flash-lit blacks, metallics, leopard spots, and cigarette-grey textures evoke dive bars, early blogs, and party photography.

label: Club Kid
description: a photo of someone wearing Club Kid, exaggerated faux fur, theatrical volume, tinted glasses, metallic accessories, dramatic sleeves, platform or pointed shoes, and nightlife spectacle transform the body into performance. Synthetic shine, UV brights, vinyl, glitter, clubwear layering, and costume-like styling reference queer nightlife and outrageous party dressing.

label: Resort
description: a photo of someone wearing Resort, loose shirts, fluid trousers, caftans, and easy dresses are built for sun, movement, and polished escape. Linen, silk, raffia, and open weaves in white, turquoise, coral, and sand reference luxury travel and warm-weather leisure.

label: Coastal
description: a photo of someone wearing Coastal, windbreakers, striped knits, easy shorts, and lightweight shirting create a breezy shoreline silhouette. Sea blue, weathered white, driftwood beige, and faded red are paired with washed cotton, rope details, and salt-air textures.

label: Gender-fluid
description: a photo of someone wearing Gender-fluid, soft suiting, skirts with shirting, pearls with work boots, and fluid drape dissolve rigid gender coding. Mixed tailoring, sheer layers, and neutral-to-jewel palettes create an intentional blend of masc and femme signals.

label: Biker
description: a photo of someone wearing Biker, black leather moto jackets with snap or band collars, zip closures, dark jeans, heavy boots or loafers, and exposed metal hardware create a road-ready rebellious silhouette. Black, tobacco, petrol, oxblood, white, and oxidized silver sit on worn leather, matte denim, stacked soles, and rugged accessories tied to motorcycle culture.

label: Soft Tailoring
description: a photo of someone wearing Soft Tailoring, relaxed or double-breasted blazers, open-collar shirting, fluid wide-leg trousers, patch pockets, loafers, and unstructured shoulders shape the body with ease instead of rigidity. Sage, taupe, cream, dusty blue, chocolate, and tan appear in linen, drapey wool, silk, and soft cotton with soft-shoulder suit construction, relaxed suiting, and refined proportion.

label: Neo-Romantic
description: a photo of someone wearing Neo-Romantic, billowing sleeves, poetic drape, narrow waists, and dark floral surfaces create a moody theatrical silhouette. Ink navy, plum, burgundy, black, and faded cream appear in velvet, lace, and washed silk with art-school drama.

label: Deconstructed Classics
description: a photo of someone wearing Deconstructed Classics, traditional blazers, shirts, and trousers are taken apart through exposed linings, uneven hems, and shifted closures. The palette stays largely neutral so altered construction and visible tailoring logic remain the focus.

label: Techno Minimalism
description: a photo of someone wearing Techno Minimalism, clean narrow layers, sleek outerwear, and restrained utility details create a machine-like silhouette with minimal noise. Black, graphite, white, and electric blue appear in smooth synthetics, bonded fabrics, and glossy matte contrasts.

label: Oversized Structure
description: a photo of someone wearing Oversized Structure, wide shoulders, enlarged shirting, voluminous trousers, and architectural outerwear create deliberate mass around the body. Crisp poplin, dense wool, and sculpted denim in black, white, and muted blue emphasize proportion over decoration.

label: Moto Culture
description: a photo of someone wearing Moto Culture, moto jackets with racing seams, zip fronts, protective paneling, contrast stripes, gloves, and performance-inspired leather or technical pieces turn the outfit toward motorsport references rather than classic biker minimalism. Black, red, white, silver, and petrol blue appear in leather, technical mesh, and sport hardware with a fast track-oriented silhouette.

label: Artisan Craft
description: a photo of someone wearing Artisan Craft, handwoven textiles, visible mending, natural dyes, and irregular surfaces create a tactile handmade silhouette. Earth pigments, undyed fibers, raw edges, and leatherwork reference workshop processes and regional textile traditions.

label: Vintage Americana
description: a photo of someone wearing Vintage Americana, faded denim, western shirts, varsity knits, work jackets, flared jeans, suede layers, and broken-in boots build a nostalgic all-American silhouette. Sun-worn red, cream, indigo, tobacco, dusty blue, and faded brown appear in aged cotton, worn flannel, washed canvas, and soft suede referencing road trips, ranch wear, and secondhand mid-century casual dress.

label: Cowboy Core
description: a photo of someone wearing Cowboy Core, cowboy hats, western denim shirts with snap buttons, bootcut or flared jeans, pointed-toe leather boots, and statement belts define a direct western-inspired silhouette. Cognac, tobacco, cream, indigo, rust, and gold pair with pearl necklaces, bandanas, bolo ties, buckle details, and rodeo-coded accessories.

label: Western Americana
description: a photo of someone wearing Western Americana, ranchwear, rodeo tailoring, western shirts, cowboy hats, bootcut denim, leather belts, and pointed boots turn frontier dress codes into contemporary fashion. Tobacco, rust, cream, indigo, faded blue, and turquoise appear in suede, denim, leather, pearl details, and heritage western accessories.

label: Denim-on-Denim
description: a photo of someone wearing Denim-on-Denim, a matching or tonal denim jacket or shirt is worn with denim jeans or skirt in the same or contrasting wash, creating a head-to-toe denim composition known as the Canadian tuxedo. Light wash on light wash, dark indigo sets, or mixed-wash combinations are unified by the denim fabric across the full silhouette.

label: 70s Revival
description: a photo of someone wearing 70s Revival, flared or wide-leg trousers, fitted knits, pointed collars, suede jackets, platform shoes, and warm-toned separates recreate a 1970s silhouette with modern styling. Camel, burnt orange, chocolate, mustard, olive, cream, and faded indigo appear in corduroy, suede, jersey, and washed denim with retro ease.

label: New Americana
description: a photo of someone wearing New Americana, patchwork, varsity details, western shirting, workwear jackets, faded denim, and heritage motifs are reworked through a contemporary streetwear or craft lens. Indigo, cream, red, tobacco, khaki, and washed blue appear in quilted textiles, bandana prints, denim, canvas, and nostalgic American symbols with updated proportion.

label: Monochrome
description: a photo of someone wearing Monochrome, the outfit is built from one tonal family such as all black, all grey, or all cream, with silhouette and texture replacing color contrast. Leather, denim, wool, jersey, and knit stack within the same color range so tonal layering, matte-versus-shine contrast, and shape become the main visual signal.

label: Color Blocking
description: a photo of someone wearing Color Blocking, large uninterrupted fields of saturated color divide the silhouette into bold graphic sections. Cobalt, tomato red, emerald, yellow, and white are arranged in crisp shapes with minimal print or texture noise.

label: Print Mixing
description: a photo of someone wearing Print Mixing, stripes, florals, checks, and abstract motifs are layered together with intentional clash and rhythm. The silhouette often stays simple so the visual energy comes from pattern scale, repetition, and chromatic collision.

label: Layering Culture
description: a photo of someone wearing Layering Culture, multiple shirts, vests, outerwear, scarves, and long hems stack to build depth and visible outfit construction. Contrasting lengths, collars, and textures in muted neutrals or mixed palettes create an intentionally complex silhouette.

label: Quiet Outdoors
description: a photo of someone wearing Quiet Outdoors, field jackets, knit layers, soft flannels, and sturdy trousers create an understated rural utility silhouette. Moss, bark, stone, and cream in brushed wool, waxed cotton, and corduroy suggest refined outdoor life without overt performance gear.

label: Coastal Grandmother
description: a photo of someone wearing Coastal Grandmother, linen button-downs, wide-leg pants, soft sweaters, and easy sandals create an elegant home-by-the-sea silhouette. White, oatmeal, chambray, flax, and pale blue reference Nancy Meyers interiors, beach houses, and relaxed domestic luxury.

label: Preppy Revival
description: a photo of someone wearing Preppy Revival, rugby shirts, pleats, loafers, striped knits, school colors, sweaters, and ivy-coded pieces are styled with sharper proportion and contemporary attitude. Navy, red, green, cream, and khaki pair with crest motifs, collegiate layering, polished bottoms, and nostalgic campus references that feel newly styled rather than streetwear jerseys, athletic shorts, or sneaker-heavy sport fits.

label: Draped Form
description: a photo of someone wearing Draped Form, fabric wraps, falls, and gathers around the body in fluid arcs rather than fixed seams and rigid lines. Jersey, silk, and soft wool in stone, black, clay, and cream create sculptural movement with Grecian and modernist references.

label: Safari
description: a photo of someone wearing Safari, belted safari jackets, utility shirts, tailored shorts, and field pockets shape a practical warm-climate silhouette. Sand, khaki, tobacco, olive, and sun-faded white in cotton twill and linen reference expedition wear and desert travel imagery.

label: Streetwear
description: a photo of someone wearing Streetwear, graphic hoodies, football or rugby jerseys, oversized tees, baggy denim, athletic shorts, statement sneakers, caps, and logo-heavy layering create a relaxed hype-aware urban silhouette. Black, white, primary brights, camo, washed indigo, forest green, scarlet, and team colors reference skate culture, hip-hop styling, sportswear crossover, and drop-driven street fashion.

label: Hip-Hop Fashion
description: a photo of someone wearing Hip-Hop Fashion, oversized jerseys, baggy denim, timberland boots, chunky gold chains, fitted caps, and athletic brands create a silhouette rooted in Black American street culture. Logomania, luxury brand mixing, and bold scale reference hip-hop's influence on global fashion from the 1990s through today.

label: Botanical Organic
description: a photo showing Botanical Organic visual language, branching veins, petal-like folds, damp matte surfaces, rootlike linework, and layered greens, bark browns, and mineral creams building a living texture map. Soft translucency, irregular symmetry, and growth-driven edges suggest garments shaped by botanical structures, biomorphic pleating, and natural-dye softness.

label: Fluid Bloom
description: a photo showing Fluid Bloom visual language, rippling petal curves, liquid gradients, glossy highlights, and unfurling shapes in blush, coral, orchid, and misty pearl. Edges appear softened as if opening underwater, with layered translucency and drifting motion cues that translate into a fashion mood of sculpted drape, blooming volume, and body-wrapped floral futurism.

label: Cellular Pattern
description: a photo showing Cellular Pattern visual language, clustered cells, membrane outlines, porous repetition, and rounded geometry packed across soft-focus surfaces. Milky neutrals, olive undertones, translucent amber, and dark nodal accents create a microscopic rhythm that reads as perforated textiles, engineered mesh, and fashion built from organic modular structures.

label: Raw Fiber
description: a photo showing Raw Fiber visual language, loose strands, dry vegetal texture, broken edges, straw-brown neutrals, and tactile weave fragments catching uneven light. The image should emphasize fuzz, fray, and handmade density so the visual reads like untreated yarn, bast cloth, or rough spun material translated into artisanal layering and earthy fabrication.

label: Veined Leaf
description: a photo showing Veined Leaf visual language, fine branching lines, semi-translucent surfaces, softened green-to-ochre shifts, and delicate rib structures radiating from a central spine. Crisp yet fragile geometry, backlit texture, and subtle organic asymmetry should evoke pleated panels, filament overlays, and fashion that feels botanical, skeletal, and precise.

label: Concrete Brutalism
description: a photo showing Concrete Brutalism visual language, poured cement texture, monolithic blocks, cold flat planes, chipped corners, and shadow-heavy geometry in ash, stone, and dust grey. Weight, blunt edges, and weather-stained surfaces should dominate the frame so the mood connects to severe tailoring, oversized structure, and hard architectural fashion silhouettes.

label: Oxidized Metal
description: a photo showing Oxidized Metal visual language, corroded steel, blue-green patina, rust blooms, scratched reflectivity, and hard industrial edges under harsh directional light. The scene should foreground surface reaction, mineral staining, and metallic wear so the image maps to coated fabrics, hardware-heavy styling, and distressed utilitarian fashion with a mechanical bite.

label: Raw Utility
description: a photo showing Raw Utility visual language, unfinished construction materials, exposed fasteners, scuffed matte surfaces, webbing-like lines, and worksite neutrals of khaki, charcoal, and cement. Direct function, abrasion, and visible assembly cues should read first, linking the environment to tactical layering, modular garments, and severe field-ready fashion pragmatism.

label: Exposed Structure
description: a photo showing Exposed Structure visual language, visible beams, braces, seams, framework joints, and linear load-bearing geometry with crisp shadows and open negative space. Steel, concrete, blackened metal, and raw timber should feel diagrammatic and unresolved, suggesting garments that reveal construction, harness systems, and architectural scaffolding around the body.

label: Hardline Framework
description: a photo showing Hardline Framework visual language, rigid grids, sharp corners, engineered repetition, and severe black-grey contrast across structural planes and industrial joints. The composition should privilege straight lines, compression, and tension, creating a visual mood that translates into strapped silhouettes, disciplined paneling, and stark modernist fashion armor.

label: Woven Surface
description: a photo showing Woven Surface visual language, interlaced bands, basketlike grids, hand-built texture, and soft shadowing across tactile material depth. Neutral leather browns, oat, stone, and muted olive should reveal repetition, compression, and subtle gloss so the image connects to intrecciato craft, woven fabrication, and quietly luxurious surface-driven dressing.

label: Patinated Finish
description: a photo showing Patinated Finish visual language, softly aged surfaces, tonal discoloration, rubbed edges, waxed luster, and time-worn depth across leather, plaster, or metal-like materials. Olive-brown, smoke, tobacco, and parchment tones should blend with subtle sheen and handling marks, evoking refined garments whose luxury comes from wear, finish, and quiet material maturity.

label: Eroded Edge
description: a photo showing Eroded Edge visual language, crumbling margins, chipped contours, rubbed corners, and granular decay where clean form breaks into powder, fuzz, or abrasion. The image should emphasize tactile loss, weather exposure, and material softness at the perimeter, suggesting garments with distressed hems, broken finishes, and intentionally worn sculptural restraint.

label: Layered Grain
description: a photo showing Layered Grain visual language, stratified texture, sediment-like bands, compressed fibers, and subtle tonal buildup across matte natural surfaces. Browns, greige, flax, and warm stone should read through stacked material depth rather than loud contrast, tying the visual to laminated textiles, refined layering, and understated fashion with crafted density.

label: Frayed Composite
description: a photo showing Frayed Composite visual language, bonded layers splitting apart, thread exposure, rough lamination, and mixed material fragments in beige, charcoal, and chalky neutrals. The frame should prioritize torn joins, fibrous edges, and construction stress so the image maps to hybrid fabrication, unfinished seams, and textural fashion built from assembled remnants.

label: Earth Palette
description: a photo showing Earth Palette visual language, clay browns, moss green, sand, umber, stone, and soft mineral variation spread across matte surfaces with low glare and natural depth. The emphasis should be on tonal harmony, dust, and grounded warmth rather than prints, creating a calm image that aligns with restrained luxury layering, brushed textiles, and quiet tailoring.

label: Monochrome Field
description: a photo showing Monochrome Field visual language, one dominant hue stretched across broad surfaces with only slight tonal steps, soft edges, and controlled texture. The scene should feel purified and spacious, whether in chalk white, graphite, camel, or black, so the visual reads as minimal fabric study, uniform dressing, and precise fashion reduced to silhouette and finish.

label: Luminous Gradient
description: a photo showing Luminous Gradient visual language, diffused light transitions, glowing color fade, misty edges, and atmospheric blending from one hue into another without hard interruption. Pearl, amber, smoke, blue, or blush should shift softly across the frame, translating into fluid fabric movement, polished finish, and a fashion mood of elevated softness and controlled radiance.

label: Muted Wash
description: a photo showing Muted Wash visual language, diluted pigment, cloudy tonal spread, brushed haze, and low-saturation color sitting softly on matte surfaces. Dusty rose, faded blue, greige, sage, and chalk should feel gently absorbed rather than sharply printed, giving the image a calm washed finish that suggests overdyed fabric, softened tailoring, and understated contemporary dressing.

label: Dusty Contrast
description: a photo showing Dusty Contrast visual language, muted dark-light separation, chalky shadow, softened highlights, and powdered tonal friction instead of crisp graphic opposition. Dry black, bone, taupe, and clay should create a subdued push-pull across worn textures, mapping the scene to spare layered styling, brushed surfaces, and fashion that feels quiet but deliberately graphic.

label: Neon Lit Night
description: a photo showing Neon Lit Night visual language, electric signage glow, deep shadow, reflective black surfaces, and saturated magenta, cyan, acid green, or amber cutting through darkness. The image should foreground urban moisture, night haze, and synthetic light spill so it connects to clubwear, technical street styling, and nocturnal fashion with cinematic intensity.

label: Wet Pavement
description: a photo showing Wet Pavement visual language, rain-darkened asphalt, oily reflections, gritty aggregate, headlight streaks, and pooled surface shine under urban night lighting. The scene should capture slick texture, cold grey-blue tone, and street residue so the mood translates into coated outerwear, utilitarian layering, and city fashion sharpened by weather and motion.

label: Geometric Tile
description: a photo showing Geometric Tile visual language, repeating hard-edged modules, grout lines, polished or matte ceramic surfaces, and strict pattern rhythm across floors or walls. Contrast, symmetry, and surface repetition should dominate the frame, linking the visual to printed coordinates, modular paneling, and fashion styling that feels urban, graphic, and architecturally composed.

label: Weathered Signage
description: a photo showing Weathered Signage visual language, peeling paint, faded lettering, rust halos, adhesive residue, and sun-bleached commercial color on battered urban surfaces. The image should feel layered with time, grit, and public wear, mapping directly to distressed graphics, washed denim, and street fashion that pulls energy from decayed city communication.

label: Transit Glow
description: a photo showing Transit Glow visual language, fluorescent station light, brushed metal, tinted glass, reflected ads, and directional color streaks moving across urban infrastructure. Cool white, yellow, red, and digital blue should skim over utilitarian surfaces, creating a mood that translates into commuter-tech layering, sleek nylon, and fast metropolitan fashion energy.
